instructions.intent: Implement enforcement that produces (files created by a node) and completion (roadmap.complete() call) must stay in sync. A node is not truly done until all declared produces exist AND complete() has been called atomically. Prevents silent failures where a node claims completion but artifacts are missing.
acceptance_criteria: Checks: (1) all files in produces exist on filesystem, (2) completion record in .roadmap/git-state.json matches produces, (3) git commit contains all produces
At least 8 unit tests (in enforce-audit.test.ts downstream)

enforcementRules: Node.complete() requires all produces files to exist
Git commit must be atomic over all produces
Completion event timestamp must match artifacts mtime (within 1s)
